title: Flexible Tactile Sensing and Stick-Slip Analysis
desc: A flexible sensing system for contact, friction, and stick-slip signal acquisition, with FFT-based feature extraction and GUI visualization.

title: ESP32-C3 Signal Acquisition Platform
desc: An embedded data acquisition platform using ESP32-C3, ADC front-end circuits, serial streaming, and Python visualization tools for micro-current sensing.

title: Electronic Skin for Robotic Tactile Feedback
desc: A robotic tactile feedback concept integrating flexible sensor arrays, signal processing, and closed-loop manipulation.

title: ROS2 / MoveIt / Gazebo Digital Twin
desc: A robot digital-twin workflow for simulation, motion planning, grasp preview, and GUI-based control.

title: YOLOv8 Industrial Part Detection System
desc: A machine-vision system for industrial part detection using YOLOv8, PyQt GUI, image/video/camera input, and result visualization.

title: AI Sensor Data Analysis Pipeline
desc: A data-analysis pipeline for sensor signal preprocessing, feature extraction, model training, ranking, and experimental evaluation.
